claims.claim: Feature scaling improves logistic regression performance on breast cancer detection beyond seed noise.
claims.reason: The measured effect exceeded seed noise by the support threshold.

hypotheses.claim_candidate: Feature scaling improves logistic regression performance on breast cancer detection beyond seed noise.
hypotheses.falsification_condition: No significant improvement in performance metrics after feature scaling.
hypotheses.minimum_evidence_needed: Statistically significant improvement in performance metrics across multiple seeds.
hypotheses.why_it_matters: Feature scaling can standardize input data, potentially enhancing the performance of logistic regression by ensuring that all features contribute equally to the model.

lab_question.question: Does feature scaling improve logistic regression on breast_cancer beyond seed noise?
success_criteria: external dataset discovery finds a usable Hugging Face or OpenML dataset
the research protocol is generated from the question, literature, and dataset audit
the experiment code is generated, statically validated, dry-run, executed, analyzed, verified, and reported

protocols.claim_blocked_if: No significant improvement in balanced accuracy and F1-score after feature scaling across multiple seeds.
protocols.claim_enabled_if: Statistically significant improvement in balanced accuracy and F1-score across multiple seeds with feature scaling.
protocols.scientific_goal: Feature scaling improves logistic regression performance on breast cancer detection beyond seed noise.
